# DebugBundle

Production debugging bundles for AI agents.

Primary docs: https://debugbundle.com/docs/
App: https://app.debugbundle.com

Documentation
- Core concepts: https://debugbundle.com/docs/v1/overview/
- API reference: https://debugbundle.com/docs/v1/api/
- CLI reference: https://debugbundle.com/docs/v1/cli/
- MCP reference: https://debugbundle.com/docs/v1/mcp/
- Webhook events: https://debugbundle.com/docs/v1/webhooks/
- Agent workflows: https://debugbundle.com/docs/agent-workflows/

Machine-readable artifacts
- OpenAPI: https://debugbundle.com/openapi.json
- Bundle schema: https://debugbundle.com/schemas/bundle.json
- Webhook events schema: https://debugbundle.com/schemas/webhook-events.json
- Profile schema: https://debugbundle.com/schemas/profile.json
- MCP tools schema: https://debugbundle.com/schemas/mcp-tools.json

Examples
- Failure bundle example: https://debugbundle.com/examples/bundle.failure.json
- Improvement bundle example: https://debugbundle.com/examples/bundle.improvement.json
